The '''Yartiv system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Halthor sector/Legends|Halthor sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was composed of the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Yartiv]], with the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] being [[Trinta]].

{{System-stub}}
